summary: Site-wide link rot cleanup — removed compromised profile, fixed 200+ broken or stale URLs (closes #1983)

changes.description: Company: Eco-Mind (domain lapsed, now redirects to expireddomains.com)
Removed 130 broken or dead-end careers_url fields where the site was still live but its careers page had moved or vanished
Updated 70+ careers_url values that 301'd to a new path on the same domain (e.g. /jobs → /careers, dropped tracking parameters)
Upgraded 12 website values that redirected from http:// to https:// or to a renamed canonical path

summary: Fourteen new remote-first tech companies added across AI, devtools, infra, security, and SaaS

changes.description: Refreshed Ghost profile — updated careers URL, blurb, and team size to current figures

summary: Removed stale Codeship entry (acquired by CloudBees in 2018)

changes.description: Codeship — codeship.com is no longer reachable; the company was acquired by CloudBees in 2018. Old URLs now redirect to the CloudBees profile.

summary: Ten new companies added from the issue #2040 backlog

changes.description: Updated careers URL for abiturma GmbH

summary: Removed dead scaffolding inherited from the upstream Eleventy template

changes.description: Unused GitHub API data fetcher (eliminates a network call and rate-limit flake on every build)
Unused YouTube and PeerTube WebC components (custom-youtube, custom-youtube-link, custom-peertube, custom-peertube-link, custom-svg)

summary: Carbon Ads integration, new company, dependency updates

changes.description: Carbon Ads ethical advertising in a sidebar layout (production only)
Sticky ad no longer overlays content on mobile viewports
Updated privacy policy with Carbon Ads disclosure
Bumped dependencies: autoprefixer, flatted, liquidjs, minimatch, picomatch, rimraf, svgo, yaml
Updated CLAUDE.md, contributing guide, PR template, and validation workflow to document addedAt/updatedAt fields

summary: Accurate company dates from git history

changes.description: Backfilled accurate addedAt/updatedAt dates for all 850+ company profiles from a decade of git history
Build time reduced from ~29s to ~18s by storing dates in frontmatter instead of computing from git on every build
Replaced biased shuffle with Fisher-Yates algorithm for featured and recently added companies
Fixed event listener memory leak in masonry grid web component
Improved site discoverability over GitHub repo
Skip PR validation for repo owner, members, and bots
Automated PR validation for company profile contributions
Removed defunct companies for various reasons (closed, acquired, no longer relevant, etc.)
Fixed broken URLs across several company profiles

summary: Search, dates, and social sharing improvements

changes.description: Pagefind-powered site search with nav dropdown and dedicated search page
Git-based dates for company profiles (added at / last updated)
Open Graph images for social sharing
Updated company profile frontmatter and documentation

summary: New companies, SEO improvements, and security hardening

changes.description: SEO improvements and bulk company URL fixes across all profiles
Cleaned up legacy files and GitHub Actions workflows

summary: Complete site redesign on Eleventy v3

changes.description: Full site redesign with company cards, browse/filter pages, and curated homepage
Structured company profiles with region, remote policy, size, and technology tags
Migrated from static README-based list to Eleventy v3 static site
Legacy URL redirects and 404 tracking with Fathom Analytics
